mapsyncer.sync.timeout: Sync timed out, please try again
mapsyncer.sync.unloading_regions: Unloading %d view distance regions for update
mapsyncer.command.no_map_dir: Unable to determine map directory. Are you connected to a server?
mapsyncer.command.help_sync_radius: /mapsyncer sync radius <blocks> - Sync map within a radius in the current dimension
mapsyncer.command.help_dimension_note: Dimension names: overworld, the_nether, the_end or full ID like twilightforest:twilight_forest
mapsyncer.cache.all_cleared: All caches cleared, no reload needed
mapsyncer.help.server.generate: /mapsyncer generate - Generate map cache for all dimensions
mapsyncer.help.server.generate_dim: /mapsyncer generate <dim> - Generate cache for specified dimension (incremental)
mapsyncer.help.server.generate_force: /mapsyncer generate <dim> force - Force regenerate (ignore existing cache)
mapsyncer.help.server.status: /mapsyncer status - Show generation task and incremental update status
mapsyncer.sync.dimension_not_available: Dimension %s map not generated or dimension does not exist, please ask admin to run generation command
mapsyncer.command.region_not_found: Region (%d, %d) does not exist in dimension %s, please verify coordinates
mapsyncer.command.generating_region: Starting generation for region (%d, %d) in dimension %s...
mapsyncer.command.incremental_tick_set: Incremental updates set to TICK mode (interval: %d ticks = %.1f seconds)
mapsyncer.command.incremental_tick_inter: Incremental updates set to TICK mode with interval %d ticks (%.1f seconds)
mapsyncer.command.incremental_scheduled_: Incremental updates set to SCHEDULED mode (daily at %02d:%02d)
mapsyncer.server.no_cache: No map cache available. Run /mapsyncer generate first.
mapsyncer.server.dim_not_available: Dimension '%s' map data not available. Run /mapsyncer generate %s first.
mapsyncer.server.map_uptodate: Map is up-to-date. %d hash match, %d timestamp skip.
mapsyncer.server.sync_start: Starting map sync: %d regions to download (%d identical, %d newer on client skipped)
mapsyncer.server.radius_disabled: Radius sync is disabled on this server
mapsyncer.sync.radius_unsupported: This server does not support radius sync
mapsyncer.waypoints.up_to_date: Public waypoints are up to date
mapsyncer.waypoints.skipped: Xaero waypoint directory not found; skipped public waypoints
mapsyncer.waypoints.file_busy: Waypoint file is busy; try manual sync later
mapsyncer.waypoints.unsupported: This server does not support manual public waypoint sync
mapsyncer.generate.full_complete: Map generation completed: %d/%d regions, %d dimensions completed: %s
mapsyncer.generate.start_force: Starting forced map generation for dimension: %s (ignoring cache)
mapsyncer.generate.force_complete: Forced dimension generation completed: %d/%d regions, %d updated
mapsyncer.status.no_task_disabled: No conversion task, incremental updates disabled
mapsyncer.status.tick_mode: Incremental updates: TICK mode, next update in %d min %d sec
mapsyncer.status.scheduled_mode: Incremental updates: SCHEDULED mode, daily at %02d:%02d
mapsyncer.status.cache_total: Cache stats: %d dimensions, %d regions, %.1f MB total
mapsyncer.sync.resume_prompt: Previous sync was interrupted. Click below to continue:
mapsyncer.command.gui_client_missing: The client does not have MapSyncer GUI enabled
mapsyncer.help.server.incremental_run: /mapsyncer incremental run - Run one incremental refresh now
mapsyncer.gui.title: MapSyncer
mapsyncer.gui.sync.tip: Sync downloads the server-generated Xaero map cache to this client. On first join, sync the current dimension or all dimensions.
mapsyncer.gui.admin.warning: Force rebuild scans the selected dimension MCA files again. Use it when the server is quiet.
mapsyncer.gui.admin.status_unsupported: This server does not support GUI status queries
mapsyncer.gui.admin.status_unavailable: Unable to request server status right now
mapsyncer.gui.admin.no_permission: This account does not have admin permission
mapsyncer.gui.settings.auto_sync.desc: When enabled, sync starts a few seconds after joining a server.
mapsyncer.gui.settings.hud.desc: Show a small progress bar near the screen edge while syncing.
mapsyncer.gui.settings.delay.desc: How long to wait after joining before auto sync starts.
mapsyncer.gui.settings.chat.desc: 0 disables percentage progress spam in chat.
mapsyncer.gui.settings.server_limit_note: Network speed limit is controlled by server config/mapsyncer.json. The client GUI only displays it.
mapsyncer.gui.voxy.note: Note: Voxy sync uses the latest save files already flushed to disk on the server; blocks placed moments ago may appear after the next server autosave.
mapsyncer.gui.voxy.reason.not_enabled: Voxy is disabled or not ready
mapsyncer.gui.voxy.reason.busy: Server is already handling your Voxy sync
mapsyncer.gui.voxy.reason.region_dir_mis: Server cannot find this dimension region directory
mapsyncer.gui.voxy.reason.client_io_fail: Client failed to write temporary files
mapsyncer.migration.start: Merging legacy Xaero map folders into mw$default in the background. This can take a while; please do not force close the game.
mapsyncer.migration.complete: Map data merged: %d copied, %d already existed, %d failed. Old mw$map folders were kept; after checking the map, you may manually delete them under xaero/world-map to save disk space.
mapsyncer.migration.failed: Failed to merge legacy map data: %s
mapsyncer.migration.skipped: No legacy Xaero map folder needs merging
mapsyncer.gui.help.role: Shows your current GUI role. Admin controls are visible only to OP-level accounts.
mapsyncer.gui.help.tab.sync: Open player sync tools for Xaero map data, radius sync, public waypoints, and Voxy.
mapsyncer.gui.help.tab.admin: Open OP-only server cache controls and radius sync policy settings.
mapsyncer.gui.help.tab.settings: Open local client preferences for automatic sync, HUD, and chat progress.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.connection: Shows the current dimension and whether this server supports MapSyncer payloads.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.map_section: Download server-generated Xaero World Map regions into the client's default map.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.extras_section: Optional sync tools. Public waypoints merge into Xaero waypoints; Voxy requires Voxy support.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.current: Sync only the dimension you are currently in.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.all: Sync every generated dimension available from the server cache.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.radius_minus: Decrease the radius sync distance by 128 blocks.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.radius_value: Radius used for local-area sync around the server-selected center point.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.radius_plus: Increase the radius sync distance by 128 blocks.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.radius_action: Request a local-area sync for the current dimension using the selected radius.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.waypoints: Ask the server to resend public Xaero waypoints and merge only the managed public group.
mapsyncer.gui.help.sync.voxy: Sync current-dimension Voxy region files when both client and server have Voxy support enabled.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.actions_section: OP-only commands for refreshing incremental cache, rebuilding a dimension, and reading server status.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.dimension: Dimension id used by force rebuild, for example overworld or minecraft:the_nether.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.incremental: Run one incremental cache refresh on the server now.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.force: Force the server to rescan MCA files and rebuild cache for the target dimension.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.refresh: Request the latest generation, cache, radius, and waypoint status from the server.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_section: Configure how player radius sync requests are limited and centered.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_enabled: Enable or disable radius sync requests for players.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_mode: Cycle the radius center mode between player position, world spawn, and fixed center.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_max_minu: Decrease the maximum allowed player radius by 128 blocks.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_max_valu: Maximum radius players can request before the server clamps it.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.radius_max_plus: Increase the maximum allowed player radius by 128 blocks.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.save_radius: Save the radius sync policy to the server config.
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.status_section: Live server summary for cache generation, dirty regions, limits, radius policy, and public waypoints.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.section: Local client-only preferences. These do not change the server's cache or speed limits.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.auto_sync: Automatically start sync a few seconds after joining a server.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.hud: Show or hide the small sync progress HUD while downloads are active.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.delay_minus: Decrease the auto-sync delay by one second.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.delay_value: How long MapSyncer waits after joining before auto-sync starts.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.delay_plus: Increase the auto-sync delay by one second.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.chat_minus: Decrease how often chat progress messages are shown.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.chat_value: 0 disables percentage progress messages in chat.
mapsyncer.gui.help.settings.chat_plus: Increase how often chat progress messages are shown.
mapsyncer.waypoints.import.permission_de: Only OPs can add public waypoints
mapsyncer.gui.admin.waypoints.import.emp: Click Scan Local Waypoints to read your Xaero waypoints.txt.
mapsyncer.gui.admin.waypoints.import.sta: No local Xaero waypoint file found
mapsyncer.gui.help.admin.waypoints_impor: OP-only tool for reading your local Xaero waypoints and publishing one selected waypoint to the server public group.
Read this server's local Xaero waypoints.txt in the background and show importable entries.
Add this local Xaero waypoint to the server public waypoint config; matching name or position updates the existing entry.
